creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
I misunderstood the use REGISTERED in xzx.config . I've
        discussed it with the author via e-mail and would like my change
        to the use of REGISTERED revoked.

Fix: 

Delete patches/patch-ab which incorrectly alters the state of
        REGISTERED.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
